channel.title: Index on Alex Hartford's homepage
channel.description: Recent content in Index on Alex Hartford's homepage

item.title: Ideas
item.description: Ideas Keeping some ideas around here. Here’s a list of my favorite ideas and works of art.

item.title: Music
item.description: My Music I put the best songs I write here! They’re ordered from newest to oldest. I made most of these songs using Logic Pro on a Mac Mini and an Akai MPK 249. ojii gate sloppy nachos jumbo the short worm lonely guy sunken ship (with June Ricks) testing (with Emelia Hartford) minute chapter apartment tired lofi mohican overworld Marginalia These are some improvisational ideas, inspired by Masakatsu Takagi’s Marginalia.

item.title: Now
item.description: What I’m doing now (my now page) Working at Nintendo, on graphics and tools. Helping to test the platform layer, graphics tools, and various other things. Designing a game which feels like Mamoru Oshii’s Angel’s Egg. This is a small project, and it might start out as a short film. My sister Mia’s doing the art, and we’ll probably work together on the music. Implementing 3D Graphics effects in my own engine, written in Jai.

item.title: Recommendations
item.description: Alex Recommends: Ideas Jonathan Blow on games and feeling Jonathan Blow on deep work Innovation in Games panel, GDC 2007 Chris Crawford’s Dragon talk Games Everyday Shooter Into The Breach Spelunky Downwell Fire Emblem IV - Genealogy of the Holy War Zelda - A Link Between Worlds Morrowind The Witness Stephen’s Sausage Roll The Beginner’s Guide Films Wolf Children Mind Game Sonatine The Wind Rises Bottle Rocket Angel’s Egg Albums
